mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Tasks ( task_type, task_title, task_description, priority, severity, status, progress, due_date, start_date, completed_date, assignee_id, assignee_name, assigner_id, assigner_name, project_id, project_name, test_case_id, execution_id, report_id, tags, remarks, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{taskType}, #{taskTitle}, #{taskDescription}, #{priority}, #{severity}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{dueDate}, #{startDate}, #{completedDate}, #{assigneeId}, #{assigneeName}, #{assignerId}, #{assignerName}, #{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{testCaseId}, #{executionId}, #{reportId}, #{tags}, #{remarks}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, NOW(), #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE Tasks SET task_type = #{taskType}, task_title = #{taskTitle}, task_description = #{taskDescription}, priority = #{priority}, severity = #{severity}, status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, due_date = #{dueDate}, start_date = #{startDate}, completed_date = #{completedDate}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, assignee_name = #{assigneeName}, assigner_id = #{assignerId}, assigner_name = #{assignerName}, project_id = #{projectId}, project_name = #{projectName}, test_case_id = #{testCaseId}, execution_id = #{executionId}, report_id = #{reportId}, tags = #{tags}, remarks = #{remarks}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Tasks WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE Tasks SET is_deleted = TRUE, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT task_id, task_type, task_title, priority, due_date, assignee_name, progress FROM Tasks WHERE assignee_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('pending', 'in_progress') AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY priority ASC, due_date ASC
SELECT task_id, task_type, task_title, priority, due_date, assignee_name, progress FROM Tasks WHERE status IN ('pending', 'in_progress') AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY priority ASC, due_date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tasks WHERE assignee_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('pending', 'in_progress') AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM Tasks WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM Tasks WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND is_deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE Tasks SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE Tasks SET progress = #{progress}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
